sprawlcrafting.craft.recipe_gone: Crafting %s cancelled — recipe no longer exists
sprawlcrafting.craft.busy: Already crafting — cancel it first with /sprawlcrafting cancel
sprawlcrafting.craft.unsupported: %s is not a plannable crafting recipe
sprawlcrafting.craft.too_complex: The recipe tree for %s is too complex to plan
sprawlcrafting.craft.needs_table: %s needs a crafting table — open one and request again
sprawlcrafting.craft.paused_no_table: Crafting %s paused — no crafting table in reach
sprawlcrafting.preview.hint: Craftable from raw resources — click to preview
